race.comment: INCANTRESS (14) deep into the campaign and drops a few levels today. Chipped away late from back in the field with an even fifth over 1250m at Newcastle in BM68 class. Has a good record here and proven in the heavy conditions. TOO DARN FINESSE (12) improving filly who can go quickly through her grades this time in. Indicated a win was imminent when she closed late for a narrow second over 1100m at Scone. Can overcome the wide gate and figure prominently. SMASHING NOVA (9) handy gelding who got off the mark first-up with a gritty victory over 1210m at Port Macquarie. Winning apprentice sticks and must be kept safe now the penny has dropped.  The chances don't end there. HIGHLY TEMPTED (1) eased back early first-up and never got into the contest with a battling eighth over 1210m at Port Macquarie. Proven second-up and both wins have been on heavy tracks. Respect.
